CyberKings is an exclusive entry to partnerships & resource backed utility, built on top of a foundation of strong burning mechanics

Before you proceed

You must agree to the following:

  • I did my own research on the Runes OMB collection
  • I will not treat purchase of this collection art as an investment
  • InscribeNow.io can not be held liable for any actions (or absence of such) by the Runes OMB collection owner
  • InscribeNow.io is not responsible for any loss related to this transaction and cannot refund any payments
  • InscribeNow.io can not and does not verify authenticity of the Runes OMB collection art, copyrights and other details
  • InscribeNow.io can delist the collection anytime if collection is found in violation of Terms or third-party intellectual property rights
  • I agree to the full Terms of Service
